steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Add the two equations: $\left(5\right)(8x) + (-5)(8x) + 4(6y) + 4(6y) = 12 + 12$, giving $\left(8\right)(6y) = 24$, so $6y = 3$. Subtract: $\left(10\right)(8x) = 0$, so $8x = 0$.

steps.title: Find the value $8x + 6y$
steps.content: $8x + 6y = 0 + 3 = 3$. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
